description: HTTP/2 Rapid Reset Attack vulnerability allows attackers to cause Denial of Service (DoS) via rapid stream reset requests.
impact: Service availability is compromised due to high CPU usage.
solution: Update web server software (Apache, Nginx) to latest patched versions.
workaround: Limit the maximum number of concurrent streams in HTTP/2 settings.

description: Log4j JNDI Remote Code Execution vulnerability.
impact: Attackers can execute arbitrary code on the server.

description: Minor privilege escalation in Linux kernel driver.
impact: Local user might gain elevated privileges.
workaround: Restrict access to the affected driver module.
